title: hieracium bifidum subsp. melaxum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. melaxum is a sub-species of the Hawkweed plant, known for its distinctive yellow flowers and leaves with a unique, divided shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. melaxum include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for minor cuts and scrapes. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be applied topically to the affected area for maximum benefit.
